title: Internet Archive Software Library
creator: Internet Archive
description: A large preservation collection of historical software, shareware, console material, computer games, documentation, and browser-accessible emulation. Individual items vary in completeness and rights status.
useful: It lets researchers encounter historical software directly and locate files or documentation that may be absent from conventional publishing histories.
audience: Historians, preservation researchers, developers, and players exploring older software in context.
learning: Search software collections by platform and date
Use emulation as one form of historical access
Record provenance and limitations when citing archived software
